# CAF Design Areas Skill (Minimal)

**The 8 Design Areas** — Billing & Tenant, Identity & Access, Resource Organization, Network Topology, Security, Management, Governance, Platform Automation — each mapped to IaC modules.

**Management Group Hierarchy** — ALZ root → Platform (Management, Connectivity, Identity, Security), Landing Zones (Online, Corp, SAP), Sandbox, Decommissioned.

**Subscription Placement** — Platform subscriptions per function; Landing Zone subscriptions by workload type (Online, Corp, SAP).

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for full content.
